## Meeting Purpose

[Brainstorm SEO strategy and content ideas to drive organic traffic to hypermode.com](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Focus on creating "concept" or "glossary" style content pages explaining key technical concepts related to Hypermode](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=68.0)
  - [These pages can live under the docs subdomain and link out to relevant product documentation](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=88.0)
  - [Prioritize topics that are aligned with Hypermode's product roadmap and capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=139.0)
  - [Leverage existing documentation, recordings, and team knowledge as inputs to generate initial drafts](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Have subject matter experts review drafts for technical accuracy before publishing](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=355.0)
  - [Explore multimedia formats like short videos explaining concepts in the future](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=470.0)

## Topics

### Keyword Research

  - [Marcel shared research on \~400 relevant keywords with search volumes and difficulty scores](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=181.0)
  - [Higher volume keywords like "knowledge graph" are very difficult to rank for](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=980.0)
  - [Lower volume but more specific keywords around AI/ML concepts may be more achievable targets](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

### Content Approach

  - [Create a "concepts" section separate from the blog, with different expectations for depth/quality](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
  - [Start by defining high-level topic clusters aligned with Hypermode's capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Generate content drafts using AI and existing materials as inputs](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=711.0)
  - [Have engineers review drafts, fill gaps, and ensure technical accuracy](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1932.0)
  - [Adapt content to Hypermode's voice/branding guidelines](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1681.0)
  - [Approach as "planting seeds" - publish drafts, then iteratively improve content that shows potential](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1707.0)

### Multimedia Content

  - [Short videos explaining key concepts can be highly engaging and help with rankings](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2470.0)
  - [Can leverage existing recordings or have team members explain concepts casually](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2477.0)
  - [Repurpose written content into video formats in the future](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2495.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Define the high-level topic clusters/lanes for the "concepts" section](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1512.0)
  - [Provide examples of desired content quality/style](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
  - [Share existing documentation, recordings, onboarding materials as inputs](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)
  - [Explore integrating the "concepts" section into the existing docs site](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2368.0)
  - [Continuously improve promising content and backlink to drive more traffic over time](https://fathom.video/share/YyhXRgsPgyB9ojkAgzGz6DebQzyHTjMx?tab=summary&timestamp=2499.0)
